comment.body: Mate, stop. She was dead right with her call, the whole week the market traded sideways. You just understood what you wanted to understand. It's OpEx, you have to expect moves like this. And ES being up or down 40pts is well within the daily ranges and does not constitute a puke. We might as well reverse this move after the AM settlement. What you're seeing could be MMs trying to minimize their option payoffs. Maybe somebody can post a delta or gamma chart for the options expiring today. Then you can see where the pain is for the MMs and if I'm correct.
